pausePools(address[]).details: This is a permissioned function. Governance must first grant this contract permission to call `pausePool` on the Vault, then grant another account permission to call `pausePools` here. Note that this is not necessarily the same account that can add or remove pools from the pausable list. Note that there is no `unpause`. This is a helper contract designed to react quickly to emergencies. Unpausing is a more deliberate action that should be performed by accounts approved by governance for this purpose, or by the individual pools' pause managers.
